nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill entry point for github-markdown-mastery. Documents the complete GitHub Markdown reference covering GFM syntax, Mermaid diagrams, LaTeX math, alerts, shields.io badges, dark-mode images, and 63 allowed HTML elements. Includes a quick-reference table of feature support across GitHub surfaces.

nodes.name: badges-reference.md
nodes.summary: Cheat-sheet reference for shields.io badges usable in GitHub Markdown. Covers badge URL patterns, styles, colors, logos, and common badge presets for CI, license, version, and platform indicators.

nodes.name: manifest.yaml
nodes.summary: Archon skill manifest for github-markdown-mastery v1.0.0. Declares triggers (keywords and patterns), priority P1, and on-demand resource references for badges-reference.md, mermaid-reference.md, and pr-patterns.md.

nodes.name: mermaid-reference.md
nodes.summary: Cheat-sheet reference for Mermaid diagram syntax within GitHub Markdown. Covers flowcharts, sequence diagrams, class diagrams, state diagrams, ER diagrams, Gantt charts, and pie charts with syntax examples.

nodes.name: pr-patterns.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for pull request body patterns in GitHub Markdown. Documents templates, structural conventions, use of alerts, collapsible sections, diff blocks, and visual hierarchy best practices for PRs.
